title: stauntonia hexaphylla f. urophylla
intro: Stauntonia hexaphylla f. urophylla, also known as the Urophylle Stauntonia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. It is a type of climbing vine native to southern China and Southeast Asia, valued for its medicinal properties and traditional uses. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and inflammation, due to its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antipyretic properties. The herbal preparations of Stauntonia hexaphylla f. urophylla include decoctions and infusions, which are used to relieve pain and reduce inflammation, and are also used to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
